mapper.select:
SELECT MENU_CD as menuCd, UP_MENU_CD as upMenuCd, MENU_NM as menuNm, MENU_LVL as menuLvl, MENU_ORD as menuOrd, PRGM_NM as prgmNm, PRGM_PATH as prgmPath, QRY_USE_YN as qryUseYn, NEW_USE_YN as newUseYn, SAVE_USE_YN as saveUseYn, DEL_USE_YN as delUseYn, OUTP_USE_YN as outpUseYn, URL_MTHD_SE as urlMthdSe, URL_ADDR as urlAddr, PARAM1 as param1, PARAM2 as param2, PARAM3 as param3, PARAM_4 as param4, PARAM_5 as param5, MENU_RMK as menuRmk, PRV_USE_YN as prvUseYn, TO_CHAR(CRT_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS crtAt, TO_CHAR(UPD_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updAt FROM CMS_COM_MENU
UP_MENU_CD IS NULL
UP_MENU_CD = #{upMenuCd}
ORDER BY MENU_ORD ASC

SELECT MENU_CD as menuCd, UP_MENU_CD as upMenuCd, MENU_NM as menuNm, MENU_LVL as menuLvl, MENU_ORD as menuOrd, PRGM_NM as prgmNm, PRGM_PATH as prgmPath, QRY_USE_YN as qryUseYn, NEW_USE_YN as newUseYn, SAVE_USE_YN as saveUseYn, DEL_USE_YN as delUseYn, OUTP_USE_YN as outpUseYn, URL_MTHD_SE as urlMthdSe, URL_ADDR as urlAddr, PARAM1 as param1, PARAM2 as param2, PARAM3 as param3, PARAM_4 as param4, PARAM_5 as param5, MENU_RMK as menuRmk, PRV_USE_YN as prvUseYn, TO_CHAR(CRT_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS crtAt, TO_CHAR(UPD_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updAt FROM CMS_COM_MENU WHERE MENU_CD = #{menuCd}
mapper.update:
UPDATE CMS_COM_MENU SET MENU_NM = #{vo.menuNm}, MENU_ORD = #{vo.menuOrd}, PRGM_NM = #{vo.prgmNm}, PRGM_PATH = #{vo.prgmPath}, QRY_USE_YN = #{vo.qryUseYn}, NEW_USE_YN = #{vo.newUseYn}, SAVE_USE_YN = #{vo.saveUseYn}, DEL_USE_YN = #{vo.delUseYn}, OUTP_USE_YN = #{vo.outpUseYn}, URL_MTHD_SE = #{vo.urlMthdSe}, URL_ADDR = #{vo.urlAddr}, PARAM1 = #{vo.param1}, PARAM2 = #{vo.param2}, PARAM3 = #{vo.param3}, PARAM_4 = #{vo.param4}, PARAM_5 = #{vo.param5}, MENU_RMK = #{vo.menuRmk}, PRV_USE_YN = #{vo.prvUseYn},
WHERE MENU_CD = #{menuCd}
